originalTitle: Live RL Research on PufferLib w/ Joseph Suarez
title: Porting Mingru to C++ and Debugging Experiment Results for Puffer 4
summary: Worked on porting the Mingru recurrent architecture to C++ for Puffer 4, aiming for 10 million steps per second with BF16. Debugged a broken optimizer causing poor scores on 2048 and launched sweeps comparing Mamba, Mingru, and LSTM.
